name: DataByteSprites Game Data Manifest
description: Shared game-data manifest for DataByteSprites: Data Discovery. This manifest connects public roster data, Studio species metadata, moves, abilities, type rules, item definitions, encounter pools, and Phase 3 runtime owners into one discoverable source for the game and diagnostics.

items.name: ByteCoin
items.description: Spent to attempt capturing a wild signal.

items.name: Signal Boost
items.description: Improves the capture window during battle.

items.name: Repair Pulse
items.description: Restores lead sprite health during battle testing.

encounterPools.name: Common Signal
encounterPools.label: Common Signal
encounterPools.description: Default scanner results for low-noise codes.

encounterPools.name: Rare Signal
encounterPools.label: Rare Signal
encounterPools.description: Higher-quality scanner result for stronger codes.

encounterPools.name: Deep Signal
encounterPools.label: Deep Signal
encounterPools.description: Rare deep-signal hit reserved for special codes and future story hooks.

mergeRules.lockedRecords: Do not include locked Studio records in normal capture pools unless a future unlock rule explicitly allows them.

validationTargets.name: Playable roster fields
validationTargets.description: Every playable roster entry should have dex, name, type, stage, rarity, icon, lore, capture chance, and stability.

validationTargets.name: Studio match exposure
validationTargets.description: Every Studio-backed playable match should expose studioId and studioSource.

validationTargets.name: Move references
validationTargets.description: Moves should reference known species IDs before they are enabled in battle.

validationTargets.name: Ability references
validationTargets.description: Abilities should reference known species IDs before they are enabled in battle.

validationTargets.name: Type chart references
validationTargets.description: Type chart rules should reference known type names before type effectiveness is enabled.

validationTargets.name: Item fields
validationTargets.description: Items should have id, name, type, and startingQuantity.

validationTargets.name: Encounter pool fields
validationTargets.description: Encounter pools should have id, label, weight, and rarity filters.

validationTargets.name: Shared roster consumption
validationTargets.description: DataByteDex and Data Discovery should consume the same runtime roster global.
